title: Kubernetes Purpose, Architecture, Reconciliation, and Environment Evidence · Spiral Platform Review
summary: An on-call handoff reconstructs kubernetes purpose, architecture, reconciliation, and environment evidence from delayed object status, challenges one retained misconception, and revises the cluster architecture and reconciliation evidence map under changed capacity. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for cluster architecture and reconciliation evidence map after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and…
objectives: Trace API server, etcd, scheduler, controller manager, kubelet, container runtime, network proxy, DNS, and add-on responsibilities for one workload transition.
Explain how API requests, admission, persisted desired state, watches, caches, and component status relate without treating any one cache as authority.
Trace desired state, observed state, controller decisions, idempotent actions, status updates, and eventual convergence through a changed failure.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# kubernetes-basics cumulative orchestration portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never invoke kubectl, read kubeconfig, contact a cluster API, or execute host commands.
workspace: kubernetes
version-baseline:
  kubernetes: 1.36.2
  minikube: 1.38.1
  gateway-api: 1.5.1
  helm: 4.2.2
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-cluster
evidence:

steps.title: K8s Control Plane Node Components · changed case · Review K8s Control Plane Node Components
steps.instruction:
review case — A review team sees kubectl 1.36.2, an unfamiliar current context, a healthy API endpoint, and a Deployment whose desired replicas differ from observed status. Trace client, API server, admission, storage, controller, scheduler, kubelet, and runtime authority without treating reconciliation as application correctness. Competency probe: Trace API server, etcd, scheduler, controller manager, kubelet, container runtime, network proxy, DNS, and add-on responsibilities for one workload transition.

Which action demonstrates K8s Control Plane Node Components without dropping earlier contracts?

For K8s Control Plane Node Components · changed case · Review K8s Control Plane Node Components, keep K8s Control Plane Node Components connected to mechanically reviewable Kubernetes object, status, and transfer evidence.
